char_overview: Specializing in miniaturized and concealable weapons. A former watchmaker who applies micro-engineering principles to 灵能 armaments.
char_looks: Dark brown bob cut, always tucked behind ears. Small, fine-boned face, amber eyes habitually narrowed in focus. Fitted navy workshop coat, high-collared white blouse, gray slacks, flat-soled leather shoes. None.
char_flaws: Obsessive to the point of paralysis. Will spend weeks on a single component. Dislikes working on anything larger than her palm. Socially awkward outside the workshop.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-微视: Perceives 灵力回路 at microscopic resolutions, allowing engraving of 灵力回路 patterns on pins, needles, and other sub-centimeter surfaces. Precision decreases with scale, optimal range is under 5cm.
char_mission: Push the limits of weapon miniaturization. Fulfill commissions that require concealment, precision, and unconventional form factors.

char_relationships.星流: Client, designed 落辰 to accommodate 星流's unstable 灵力 reserves, building a variable-output mechanism that most 工坊s refused to attempt. Considers the project her finest work.
char_relationships.狩灵协会3科: Certified 工坊, maintains proper certification but finds the inspection procedures tedious. Files all paperwork with grudging precision.
